form.formComment: Finished second at big odds last time (26.40) over 460m at Warragul. Gets the rails draw this time. Solid top-three prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second at big odds last time (26.40) over 460m at Warragul. Gets the rails draw this time. Solid top-three prospects.

form.formComment: Was in the placings when second (25.80) at Shepparton at last run before a spell time and returns here after three-and-a-half months. Has had two fresh up runs and has recorded the one placing. Has found the right race and can take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was in the placings when second (25.80) at Shepparton at last run before a spell time and returns here after three-and-a-half months. Has had two fresh up runs and has recorded the one placing. Has found the right race and can take this out.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 3.5 lengths at this track over 350m (19.55) beating Highgate Franky in Bottom Up - Grade 7 on April 8. Can keep things rolling.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 3.5 lengths at this track over 350m (19.55) beating Highgate Franky in Bottom Up - Grade 7 on April 8. Can keep things rolling.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Marred approaching 100m mark.
Eased and turn head inwards at 50m mark.

form.formComment: Could only manage seventh last time but had been in the money the two starts prior, most recently when a narrow second (19.27) over 350m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and appears tested on latest effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage seventh last time but had been in the money the two starts prior, most recently when a narrow second (19.27) over 350m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and appears tested on latest effort.

form.formComment: Easy winner leading throughout to score by 6 lengths in a Maiden last start at Warragul, clocking a brilliant 25.82 for the 460m trip. Can measure up again if runs up to that effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Easy winner leading throughout to score by 6 lengths in a Maiden last start at Warragul, clocking a brilliant 25.82 for the 460m trip. Can measure up again if runs up to that effort.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 2.5 lengths at this track over 300m (17.38) beating Miss Duddles in Maiden on April 3. Prepared to risk.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 2.5 lengths at this track over 300m (17.38) beating Miss Duddles in Maiden on April 3. Prepared to risk.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage third but before that won by a neck at this track (16.93) beating Ronaldo Jack in a T3 Grade 7 on March 25. Solid chance with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage third but before that won by a neck at this track (16.93) beating Ronaldo Jack in a T3 Grade 7 on March 25. Solid chance with even luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Collided soon after start, faltered and tailed off.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 525m at The Meadows by 0.9 lengths in a Maiden. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 525m at The Meadows by 0.9 lengths in a Maiden. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Far too good last start to win by 9 lengths at Warragul over 460m (25.97) beating Radiate in Rank Limit - Restricted Win on April 16. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Far too good last start to win by 9 lengths at Warragul over 460m (25.97) beating Radiate in Rank Limit - Restricted Win on April 16. Hard to envisage a win.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 460m at Warragul. That followed a win two back in 22.56 beating We Got Lucky over 390m at Shepparton. Not keen this time.

formComments.comment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 460m at Warragul. That followed a win two back in 22.56 beating We Got Lucky over 390m at Shepparton. Not keen this time.
